title: Floating Shelves with Sides
description: Quick and easy shelf build. These plans will build two floating shelves, a larger shelf on the bottom and a slightly smaller shelf that can be installed above it.

steps.title: Cut 1x8s to size
steps.body: Following the drawings in the "Extras" tab cut your four 1" x 8" to length and width

steps.title: Add angle to bottom plates
steps.body: as noted in drawings add your 45 deg cut to the front face bottom side of you two bottom shelves (Part B & D)

steps.title: Add Radius to bottom plates
steps.body: using a router, add a 3/16" radius to the front top side of your bottom plate (Parts B & D)

steps.title: Add pocket holes
steps.body: Using your Kreg pocket jig, drill your pocket holes on the bottom side of Part B & D

steps.title: Cut sides
steps.body: Following the dimensions on the drawings, cut out the side pieces for both shelves (Part C & E)

steps.title: Sand all pieces
steps.body: before assembly, lightly sand all pieces. We rounded all the edges in the front lip down to give it a nice smooth finish

steps.title: Add Key holes
steps.body: to hang the shelves on the wall we used key holes. We routed 5" long slots starting 2" in from the ends. Depending on Stud locations you may want to customize this.

steps.title: Assemble Back and Bottom
steps.body: Assemble backs and bottoms of the small and large shelves. We used wood glue and pocket hole screws in the pocket holes to secure together.

steps.title: Fill Pocket holes
steps.body: Using Kreg plugs, we filled all the pocket holes

steps.title: Attach sides
steps.body: attach the sides to the ends of the shelves as per the drawings. Secure with wood glue and brad nails

steps.title: Final sand
steps.body: fill any imperfections/holes with wood filler, let dry, and give the piece a final sand

steps.title: Stain
steps.body: Stain and let dry - we used Varathane Dark Walnut Wood Stain

steps.title: Varnish
steps.body: once stain drys Varnish the shelves to protect - we used Minwax Clear Matte Latex Polycrylic Finish. We like this finish as it dosen't yellow once it drys.

steps.title: Mount Shelves
steps.body: mount your shelves to the wall using your key holes and enjoy!
